arts.sum: FC Barcelona were back to their best in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, beating Real Madrid 5-2 in the final of the Spanish Super Cup. The win is not just a first trophy of the campaign for the team, but also a first trophy for many players, several of whom are Barça Atlètic squad members. Barcelona secured a huge 5-2 victory over rivals Real Madrid in the Spanish Supercup final on Sunday night, giving them not only a title but a morale-boosting win after a difficult start to the year.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr annoyed at substitute vs Barcelona: what it might mean for Real Madrid
arts.sum: In the 76th minute of the Spanish Super Cup final, Carlo Ancelotti made an unexpected decision: with Madrid losing, the Italian coach substituted Vinícius Jr. The substitution was particularly surprising because Vinícius has only been taken off the field in eight other games this season .

arts.ttl: Barcelona President on why Dani Olmo wasn’t registered sooner and details of Nike and VIP seat deals
arts.sum: Barcelona President Joan Laporta has defended his handling of their new Nike sponsorship deal, and the decision to sell the rights to commercialise 675 VIP seats to investors in Qatar and the UAE. The two deals were undertaken with a view to allowing the club to register Dani Olmo and Pau Victor, but Laporta claims […] The post Barcelona President on why Dani Olmo wasn’t registered sooner and details of Nike and VIP seat deals appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford sets Wednesday deadline for transfer decision – Manchester United player will walk away from club otherwise
arts.sum: On Friday, Sport reported Barcelona have decided to go all out to sign Manchester United’s Marcus Rashford in the winter market. The forward hasn’t featured for the Red Devils for over a month as Ruben Amorim has left him out of his plans. He reportedly wants to leave Old Trafford and Barcelona are among his The post Marcus Rashford sets Wednesday deadline for transfer decision – Manchester United player will walk away from club otherwise appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Rashford exit delay, Arsenal target Barcelona star, Liverpool latest
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's move from Manchester United to AC Milan is now more complicated because of Kyle Walker and Arsenal have joined the race to sign Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo

arts.ttl: ‘Look for something else’ - De Jong urged to leave Barca by Gullit
arts.sum: Gullit says that it’s time for De Jong to move on and believes a transfer to Bayern Munich would be the perfect situation for all. Frenkie de Jong has been urged to leave Barcelona due to his current struggle for minutes by Dutch legend Ruud Gullit.

arts.ttl: Barcelona add new name to striker transfer shortlist
arts.sum: The powers that be at La Liga giants Barcelona have added a fresh name to their shortlist of centre-forward targets. That’s according to Cadena SER, who point towards Benjamin Šeško…

arts.ttl: Barcelona lineup vs. Real Betis: Predicted XI for Copa del Rey clash with Ronald Araujo set to start
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Barcelona could line up for Wednesday's Copa del Rey clash with Real Betis Estadi Olímpic Lluis Companys.

arts.ttl: Another Barcelona attacker has now scored as many goals this season as he did in all of last season
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the uptick in production being enjoyed by Barcelona star Robert Lewandowski this season, has come to the fore online. This, of course, comes after the Pole…

arts.ttl: Key Real Betis star could miss Barcelona clash with injury
arts.sum: A headline member of the midfield ranks at Real Betis looks increasingly likely to miss his side’s upcoming showdown with Hansi Flick’s Barcelona. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point…
